Øããè¦ããâ•ããäÊã, „¹ã ÔããäÞãÌã (Ik'kq dY;k.k) ãä›¹¹ã¥ããè : ¼ããÀ¦ããè¾ã •ããèÌã-•ãâ¦ãì ‡ãŠÊ¾ãã¥ã ºããñ¡Ã ‡ãñŠ ¹ãì¶ãØãÃŸ¶ã Ôãâºãâ£ããè ¹ãÖÊãñ ‡ãŠãè ‚ããä£ãÔãîÞã¶ãã†â Ôãâ.‡ãŠã.‚ãã.2005(‚ã), ãäª¶ããâ‡ãŠ 29 ¶ãÌã½ºãÀ, 2007, ‡ãŠã.‚ãã. 2981(‚ã), ãäª¶ããâ‡ãŠ 29 ãäªÔã½ºãÀ, 2008, ‡ãŠã.‚ãã. 3077(‚ã), ãäª¶ããâ‡ãŠ 30 ¶ãÌã½ºãÀ, 2009 ¦ã©ãã ‡ãŠã.‚ãã. 2882(‚ã), ãäª¶ããâ‡ãŠ 1 ãäªÔã½ºãÀ, 2010 ‡ãñŠ ¼ããÀ¦ã ‡ãñŠ Àã•ã¹ã¨ã ½ãò ¹ãÆ‡ãŠããäÍã¦ã ÖìƒÃ ©ããèý MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 28th February, 2014 S.O. 602(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 4 and Section 5A of the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals Act, 1960 (59 of 1960), the Central Government hereby reconstitutes the Animal Welfare Board of India consisting of the following persons as its Members for a period of three years w.e.f. 01.03.2014, namely :— 1. Director General of Forests, Ministry of Member (ex-officio) under Section 5(1)(a) Environment and Forests, New Delhi 2. The Animal Husbandry Commissioner, Member (ex-officio) under Section 5(1)(b) Ministry of Agriculture, New Delhi 3. Shri V. Bidar, Karnataka In terms of sub-section (3) of Section 5 of the aforesaid Act, Maj. General (Retd.) Dr. R. M. Kharb, AVSM is nominated as the Chairman and Dr. S. Chinny Krishna the Vice Chairman of the Animal Welfare Board of India. [F. No. 11/8/2013-AWD] M. GEETHANJALI, Dy. Secy. (AW) Note :—The earlier notifications regarding reconstitution of the Animal Welfare Board of India were published in the Gazette of India vide number S.O. 2005(E), dated 29.11.2007, S.O. 2981(E), dt. 29.12.2008, S.O. 3077(E), dt. 30.11.2009 and S.O. 2882(E), dt. 1.12.2010.
